summary: Checked 28 claims against actual codebase. All critical claims verified. Found 1 minor naming imprecision.

findings.claim: Tech-spec references 'Phase 1.2' of code-writing SKILL.md (lines 29, 64, 98, 191, 230, 297, 300) as a sub-phase for conditional DS token integration
findings.reality: code-writing SKILL.md has 'Phase 1: Preparation' with numbered steps (1. Parse Requirements, 2. Read Project Context, 3. Analyze & Review Approach). There is no 'Phase 1.2' sub-phase — the intended target is step 2 'Read Project Context (Graceful)' within Phase 1. The notation 'Phase 1.2' could be misinterpreted as a formal sub-phase header that doesn't exist.
findings.location: Tech-spec sections: Architecture (line 29), How it works item 5 (line 64), Decision 6 (line 98), Scenario testing item 7 (line 191), Acceptance Criteria (line 230), Task 7 (line 297-300)

verified_claims: design-generate has Phase 0 through Phase 5 (6 phases confirmed)
code-writing Phase 1 has step 2 'Read Project Context'
relative path ../../shared/design-references/ resolves correctly from skills/
4 design skills exist: init, generate, review, retrospective
